string-array.name: answer_arr
string-array.item: Xunyou nsa turbo adi Okpokoro Mmekọ/XArena adi mkpo udua enamde ono TECNO/Infinix ndi fiak ndebede nsa Network fo. Ekeme ndi solve mfana Okuk latency, disconnection, etc ke ndi nam Network fo odono ke nsa edi ukem. Adiana Wi-Fi ke mme Network Fo Akara Data (5G/4G/3G).
Nsa turbo adiana uwak mme nsa. Bede ubak nsa ekemeke ndi oost, afo me keme ndi kot online customer service for Ukong.
TECNO/Infinix ID edi akaunt owo mbre akamade Xunyou Nsa turbo mme uton ke Okpokoro Mmekọ/XArena. Akaunt ekeme ndiyene ekpakn-akpan mfon mme eno ke mme boost service ke ama login.
1. Toho emi dian akpan-akpan ke iko abangade fi ye Network fo. 2. Sie mme balance ukpe okuk akaunt odu awak ndi diana ye ukpe okuk.
Mbok tuk link ke usuk man okot %1$s ye %2$s.

string-array.name: question_arr
string-array.item: Nsuto nsa ke turbo nsa adiana?
Afe account e bound nsa turbo?
Ekeme ndi solve nfana upe okok?
Mmong ke okot Idip idem policy and Ufang Ubono Mpo Isiọn̄ meyeme?
